All right, last piece of this that I want to reiterate is that you need to keep your follow-up game strong, okay? So do not forget, omit all the excitement to do what I said and to ensure that people receive the proper communication, okay? So if they're moving forward that you're gonna push them to another interview. If they're you're declining them that you know thanking them for the process but that you you know have filled the position or gone another direction or lastly, maybe they're waiting to hear back, but you filled the position. So use my examples to work off of communicate with people, let them know where they're at and be clear about next steps.
